'''âz-f-d-k''' ('''kazafdekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ambiguify|ambiguify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ambiguify|ambiguify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-f-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazafdekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizafdekoko|thizafdekoko]] || [[word:jizafdekoko|jizafdekoko]] || [[word:shizafdekoko|shizafdekoko]] || [[word:kizafdekoko|kizafdekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzafdekoko|thuthuzafdekoko]] || [[word:jujuzafdekoko|jujuzafdekoko]] || [[word:shushuzafdekoko|shushuzafdekoko]] || [[word:kukuzafdekoko|kukuzafdekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
